title: Fix Color Scheme, Font Pairing, and Background Style selectors not updating preview or persisting on save

requirements.text: Fix the Color Scheme selector in TemplateThemeStep so that selecting a color scheme immediately updates the InvitationFormContext state and is reflected in the live TemplatePreview component without requiring a page reload.

quotes: the Color Scheme, Font Pairing, and Background Style selectors are not reflecting any changes in the live preview or after saving

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking a color scheme swatch in ColorSchemePicker updates the form context's color scheme field immediately.
The TemplatePreview component re-renders to reflect the newly selected color scheme without a page reload.
The selected color scheme is persisted when the invitation is saved.

requirements.text: Fix the Font Pairing selector in TemplateThemeStep so that selecting a font pairing immediately updates the InvitationFormContext state and is reflected in the live TemplatePreview component.

quotes: the Color Scheme, Font Pairing, and Background Style selectors are not reflecting any changes in the live preview or after saving

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking a font pairing option in FontSelector updates the form context's font pairing field immediately.
The TemplatePreview component re-renders using the selected font pairing's heading and body fonts.
The selected font pairing is persisted when the invitation is saved.

requirements.text: Fix the Background Style selector in TemplateThemeStep so that selecting a background style immediately updates the InvitationFormContext state and is reflected in the live TemplatePreview component.

quotes: the Color Scheme, Font Pairing, and Background Style selectors are not reflecting any changes in the live preview or after saving

acceptanceCriteria: Selecting a background style option updates the form context's background style field immediately.
The TemplatePreview component re-renders to show the selected background style (e.g., watercolor texture, ornate border).
The selected background style is persisted when the invitation is saved.

requirements.text: Audit and fix the data flow between TemplateThemeStep, ColorSchemePicker, FontSelector, and TemplatePreview to ensure all three selector values (colorScheme, fontPairing, backgroundStyle) are correctly read from and written to InvitationFormContext via the updateFormData callback, and that TemplatePreview consumes these values reactively from context.

quotes: the Color Scheme, Font Pairing, and Background Style selectors are not reflecting any changes in the live preview or after saving

acceptanceCriteria: ColorSchemePicker, FontSelector, and the Background Style selector all call updateFormData with the correct field names matching those consumed by TemplatePreview.
TemplatePreview reads colorScheme, fontPairing, and backgroundStyle directly from InvitationFormContext (not from stale local state or props).
No selector selection is silently lost or overwritten during re-renders or step navigation.

requirements.text: Ensure that when an existing invitation is loaded in InvitationEditor, the colorScheme, fontPairing, and backgroundStyle values saved in the backend are correctly hydrated into InvitationFormContext so that the selectors and preview reflect the previously saved values on load.

quotes: not reflecting any changes in the live preview or after saving

acceptanceCriteria: Opening an existing invitation in the editor pre-selects the saved color scheme, font pairing, and background style in their respective selectors.
The TemplatePreview shows the previously saved customization immediately on load.
Saving the invitation persists the current selector values to the backend without resetting them.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
All fix changes must be confined to frontend components and context; do not alter the backend data schema unless strictly required to persist missing fields.
nonGoals: Adding new template options or design variants beyond fixing existing ones.
Fixing unrelated invitation editor bugs not mentioned in this request.
